title: Distant Worlds
description: Adds dimension with its own biomes, materials, mobs and even new crafting method
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/813/283/distant_worlds_reborn_logo.png)


- Created using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)

- Requires installation of [GeckoLib](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/geckolib/files?version=1.18.2), [Curios](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/curios/files?version=1.18.2) and [Patchouli](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/patchouli/files?version=1.18.2)

- You can also download [Distant Worlds: Emissive Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/distant-worlds-emissive-pack)

- Check out the [Mod Trailer](https://youtu.be/czWhL1SmepQ) and [Wiki](https://github.com/TANC57/DistantWorlds/wiki) to learn more about

## • About Distant Worlds •
> **Description:** Distant Worlds mod is full of new game elements in the style of techno magic. Let's explore new dimension with different biomes, fight and tame mobs, use many building or functional blocks and discover new crafting method! *(More dimensions will be added later)*

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0aFiDQz/images/659c786d254e4364d3492631d51759f1b7a4fd3e.png)

> **Biomes:** Dimensions will be colorful and diverse with many new biomes! Each of them will have its own theme and interesting features. Here you will find many new blocks for your buildings.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0aFiDQz/images/340fe65f2ea24cbc42e669b5bb10fdb5d3706774.png)

> **Mobs:** Fight and tame! You can meet many new enemies and friends there. Loot will be really valuable, because you can create many useful things from it. Tamed animals will be able to protect you or help in a difficult battle.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0aFiDQz/images/0f73fa4fb5c419b45e4036a01f0fdfc27aeb163c.png)

> **Researches:** Mod will be easier to understand with the research system! Find abandoned libraries, look for ancient papers, and do your own researches to find out more about what you've come across. New entries will appear in your books. Check them out to learn more.

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0aFiDQz/images/b4a4ac56c5c2e0956a17cd05c4cd5388182bb9bf.png)

> **Rituals:** Build structure for rituals to create stronger tools and armor using new materials. Special blocks with their functionality and various ways of receiving and moving energy are available to you. Craft and use enhancement modules to make rituals more comfortable for you!

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/z0aFiDQz/images/972b6c169990be7164c597139bc0114baa7cc1e5.png)

## • Getting Started •

> Each player receives a Distant Worlds Book upon entering the world for the first time. Garhenna Book will receive new entries as you explore and travel. Use these books to learn all the information you need to start your journey.
